Properties.Description: AWS CDK resource provider framework - onEvent (SharedStack-dev/SharedSchema/Provider)

statements: CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS app;
CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS vector;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS app.sessions (
      id uuid PRIMARY KEY,
      tenant_id text NOT NULL,
      user_id text NOT NULL,
      title text NOT NULL DEFAULT 'New chat',
      created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
      updated_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
    );

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS app.messages (
      id uuid PRIMARY KEY,
      tenant_id text NOT NULL,
      session_id uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES app.sessions(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
      user_id text NOT NULL,
      role text NOT NULL,
      content text NOT NULL,
      citations jsonb NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb,
      attached_files jsonb NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb,
      created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
    );

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS app.session_files (
      file_id uuid PRIMARY KEY,
      tenant_id text NOT NULL,
      session_id uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES app.sessions(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
      user_id text NOT NULL,
      original_name text NOT NULL,
      sanitized_name text NOT NULL,
      content_type text NOT NULL,
      size_bytes bigint NOT NULL,
      storage_bucket text NOT NULL,
      storage_key text NOT NULL,
      status text NOT NULL,
      created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
      updated_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
    );
